summary: REST API reference — endpoints, auth, responses — last claimed Apr 2026
ground_truth_basis: VERIFIED DISCREPANCIES (70 days stale): (1) Response formats wrong: /health returns {ok,app,environment} not {status,timestamp}; /status returns {online,uptime_seconds,uptime_human,daemons,model} not {status,uptime_seconds,daemons_active,daemons_total,model,provider,last_heartbeat}; /sessions returns {items:[...]} not {sessions:[...]}. (2) MISSING entire endpoint groups claimed in doc: /api/goals (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) — zero matches in codebase; /api/memory/chronicles — not implemented; /api/memory/dreams — not implemented; /api/home-assistant/entities + call_service — zero matches except config ref in mission_control_helpers.py. (3) Auth endpoints wrong: doc claims POST /api/auth/login generates API keys, actual code in auth.py has /register, /verify-email, /login (OAuth), /google/*, /pair/* — no API key generation endpoint. (4) Tool endpoints overstated: doc claims GET /api/tools lists catalogs; actual code shows /tool-router-state not /tools. (5) Timestamp stale: doc header says "Sidst opdateret: 2026-04-28"; today is 2026-07-08. Real API has grown to 692+ routes per recent audits, 212+ commits to api/routes since doc date. Base URL jarvis.srvlab.dk mentioned but not verified in active config — appears aspirational. Files examined: /media/projects/jarvis-v2/apps/api/jarvis_api/routes/*.py (status.py, health.py, chat.py, auth.py, account.py, mission_control_runs_ops.py, tool_router.py), schemas/health.py.
superseded_by: No newer API reference doc found; actual endpoints documented piecemeal in route files + MEMORY.md references

No superseding docs found.

summary: Phase 3 blind test results: Bjørn's author-attribution accuracy (28% overall, 60% Jarvis-specific recall, 64% δ-trials)

summary: Spec proposing awakening of 8 layers of dark systems via inner-life connections. Core work delivered.

File line counts verified against spec claims (most match within Boy Scout refactor variance). Self-review doc (2026-07-05-dark-systems-awakening-self-review.md) exists and identified C/H/M issues, many since addressed in later commits (e.g., feat(voice) commits 2026-07-05, feat(body) 2026-07-06). Code is live and functional.
